# OpenEdit Evaluation Cache

This folder stores resumable cache files for GEditBench v2 pairwise evaluation runs.

Typical file names

- `geditv2_configs_pipelines_vlm_as_a_judge_eval_if_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`
- `geditv2_configs_pipelines_vlm_as_a_judge_eval_vc_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`
- `geditv2_configs_pipelines_vlm_as_a_judge_eval_vq_yaml_results_cache.jsonl`

These files are derived runtime caches and can be deleted if you want to recompute results from scratch.
